_comment: Recipes, food names, half-success hints, success wisdom, nonsense slips, shops, and ingredients are sourced from the Markdown PRD. Issue titles, taxonomy, and riddle_text remain explicitly annotated where inferred or generated.

issues.title: Deadline 任务过载
issues.riddle_text: 猫大师说：把「极度的清醒，用来切断深夜谎言。」和「温柔的假面，掩盖了生活苦底。」献上，才会显出「热奶茶」的答案。

source_notes.notes: Markdown PRD includes this issue title as an example in the card-selection flow. Recipe, food name, half-success hint, and success wisdom are direct appendix content; taxonomy and riddle text still need human review.

issues.title: 创作起步恐惧
issues.riddle_text: 猫大师说：把「洁白单调，空虚需要苍白来填。」和「浓稠脏酱汁，让平凡瞬间堕落。」献上，才会显出「咖喱肠粉」的答案。

source_notes.notes: Markdown PRD does not provide a canonical title, full taxonomy placement, or per-issue riddle copy for this issue. Title and taxonomy are inferred from success wisdom themes; riddle_text is generated from Appendix Four ingredient descriptions.

issues.title: 机械式续命

source_notes.notes: Markdown PRD does not provide a canonical title, full taxonomy placement, or per-issue riddle copy for this issue. Title and taxonomy are inferred from success wisdom themes; riddle_text is generated from Appendix Four ingredient descriptions.
